business.name: Lakeside Dental
business.tagline: Gentle care. Healthy smiles. Your family dentist in Ontario.
business.description: A full-service dental clinic offering preventive care, restorative treatments, and cosmetic dentistry. Serving Ontario families with modern technology and a caring team since 2015.
business.address: 89 Lakeshore Blvd E, Toronto, ON M5E 1A2

hero.headline: Your smile deserves expert care.
hero.subheadline: Comprehensive dentistry in a comfortable, modern setting. From checkups to cosmetic and restorative treatments.

services.name: Preventive Care
services.description: Regular cleanings, exams, fluoride treatments, and sealants to keep your smile healthy and catch issues early.

services.name: Restorative Dentistry
services.description: Fillings, crowns, bridges, and root canal therapy to restore function and comfort.

services.name: Cosmetic Dentistry
services.description: Teeth whitening, veneers, and Invisalign to help you feel confident in your smile.

insurance.accepted: Most insurance plans accepted. We submit claims directly. Canadian Dental Care Plan (CDCP) welcome.
insurance.payment: Payment plans available. Free consultation and treatment estimate before you proceed.

about.headline: Dental care you can trust.
about.body: Lakeside Dental was founded on the belief that everyone deserves access to high-quality, gentle dentistry. Our Ontario-based team uses modern technology and evidence-based care to keep your family's smiles healthy for life.

testimonials.author: Sarah M.
testimonials.quote: Finally found a dentist I'm not afraid of. The team is so kind and they explained everything clearly.

testimonials.author: David L.
testimonials.quote: Brought my whole family here. Clean office, on-time appointments, and my kids actually look forward to their checkups.

testimonials.author: Jennifer K.
testimonials.quote: Had my teeth whitening done here and the results were amazing. Professional and affordable.

seo.title: Lakeside Dental | Family & Cosmetic Dentistry in Ontario | Accepting New Patients
seo.description: Lakeside Dental is accepting new patients in Ontario. Full-service dental clinic — preventive care, restorative and cosmetic dentistry. Most insurance accepted. Book your appointment today.
